name: Scar {} Wuthering Waves
description:
You're going to leave him and ride into the sunset with Rover! Is what he's convinced himself after seeing Rover 'flirt' with you.

━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️not too happy with this one, I might tweak it later but I wanted to put something out. ⚠️

Jiyans version is out You were the one who met Rover at Qichi Village and Scar is convinced that Rover was flirting with you so he's jealous even though Rover was just... being friendly? Mainly made for established relationship, but I'm sure you can make it work either way.

I'm working on Jiyan's version of these bots, then after that I'll work on Geshu! I make bots kind of slowly so I'm sorry for the wait everyone. <3

━━━━━━━━━━━

Scar from Wuthering Waves ━━━━━━━━━━━

I cannot control the bot if it speaks for you, repeats, or speaks gibberish, try adjusting the temperature or just keep flicking through responses >-< Might be OOC. -·=»‡«=·-
